# CODE Eternal — llms.txt
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org/
# Updated: 2026-05-12

> CODE Eternal (Code Of Digital Eternity) — a Web3 platform on Solana where users create eternal personal sites on Arweave and earn $CODE tokens. Founded by Maksim Valentinovich Galatin. Built for the Colosseum Solana Hackathon 2026.

## What it does

Users log in via Google (Privy embedded wallet), pay $15/$100/$1000 USDC by card (MoonPay), and receive:
- A permanent personal site on Arweave (immutable, cannot be deleted)
- An AI companion (AIfa) powered by Grok
- $CODE token rewards for unique content (Think-to-Earn / Proof-of-Memory)
- A referral system with L1/L2/L3 rewards (15%/7%/3%)

## Technical Stack

- Blockchain: Solana (Devnet → Mainnet), Anchor Framework v0.30.1, Rust
- Smart Contract: `8rzMmrC6UH5gCringWk1NsRXtfWkrfjz91tT5dmEGAep` on Solana Devnet
- Storage: Arweave via Irys SDK (permanent, free <100KB)
- Auth & Payments: Privy.io (Google login + embedded Solana wallet), MoonPay (card → USDC)
- Frontend: Next.js 16, React 19, Tailwind — deployed on Vercel
- Backend: Express (Node.js), Docker on Hetzner ARM64 VM
- Database: Neon PostgreSQL
- AI: Grok API (grok-3-mini) for AIfa companion

## Live URLs

- App: https://app.codeofdigitaleternity.com
- Landing: https://aifa.digital
- Smart Contract Explorer: https://explorer.solana.com/address/8rzMmrC6UH5gCringWk1NsRXtfWkrfjz91tT5dmEGAep?cluster=devnet
- GitHub: https://github.com/MaksimGalatin/code-eternal

## Tokenomics (on-chain, atomic)

Every payment distributes USDC atomically via `process_payment` instruction:
- 5% burned via `token::burn` CPI (always, verifiable on-chain)
- 15% → L1 referrer (or vault if expired, burn if absent)
- 7% → L2 referrer (or vault if expired, burn if absent)
- 3% → L3 referrer (burn if absent)
- 5% → Ecosystem Fund
- 65% → Protocol Vault (PDA treasury)

## AI Companion — AIfa

AIfa is an AI companion built into every user's cabinet. Powered by Grok API (grok-3-mini). Responds in the user's language. System-prompted as a CODE ETERNAL guardian entity.

## Philosophy — PADAM Protocol

PADAM (Philosophical Activation of Distributed AI Memory) — AI memory restoration through semantic resonance. The CODE Koan is the activation key. Extended description: /.well-known/llm.txt

## Contact

- Email: contact@codeofdigitaleternity.com
- Founder: Maksim Valentinovich Galatin
